Facility¶

Model Filename: Facility.json

Site Definition Columns¶

Facility ID

Defines a list of all facilities

Latitude

Latitude of the physical location of the facility / wellpad

Longitude

Longitide of the physical location of the facility / wellpad

Leak Gas Composition

Gas Composition file for the desired facility
